MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Jul-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: TRACY TUMLIN, ESQ., 808.345.7192, FOR PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY SANSOME LP.
CHRISTOPHER JOHNS, ESQ., 415.459.5223, FOR DEFENDANT ZHIAN REZAI, INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF THE ZHIAN Z. & JACKLYN J. TRUST.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY SANSOME LP's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is denied as moot. Plaintiff filed this motion on March 20, 2013, and attacked the original answer filed on September 11, 2009. When defendant filed an amended answer on April 30, 2013, the amended answer rendered this motion moot. See State Compensation Insurance Fund v. Sup Crt. (2010) 184 Cal.App.4th 1124, 1130-1131. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS ZHIAN Z. REZAI, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE, AND JACKLYN J. REZAI, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Appearances: Paul G. Minoletti (650.638.9600) for plaintiff and responding party; Leonard Mastromonaco of Mastromonaco Real Property Law Group (956.4030) for defendants and moving parties.

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. The undisputed evidence shows that: (1) M S Ltd. LP was the party that entered into the contracts; (2) M S Ltd. LP (through Nordeman) filed a fictitious business name statement with the San Mateo County Clerk, see Ex. F to Currie declaration; (3) the fictitious business name statement lists M S Ltd. LP as a general partnership; (4) M S Ltd. LP recorded the mechanics' lien, see Ex. G. to Currie declaration; and (5) M S Ltd. LP never had a contractor's license. Defendants are entitled to summary judgment under B & P Code section 7031. See also Opp v. St. Paul Fire & Marine Insurance Company (2007) 154 Cal App 4th 71; W.S.S. Industrial Construction, Inc. v. Great West Contractors, Inc. (2008) 162 Cal App 4th 581. Order on defendants' objections to plaintiff's evidence in opposition, order granting motion and judgment signed in open court. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
